title: Briny Shattering Egyptian Ice Cream Mushimono
description: A unique fusion of Egyptian and Buddhist flavors, featuring a briny ice cream and steam-cooked mushrooms. Serve as a soothing dessert on a sick day, vegan-friendly and low-fat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whip the Fattoush ice cream until it begins to break down and become airy.
Steam the Mushroom duxelles over boiling water until it reaches 1606F for 10 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
Chill the Pickled fennel in the refrigerator until ready to use.
Assemble the Briny Shattering Egyptian Ice Cream Mushimono by spooning the steamed Mushroom duxelles over the Fattoush ice cream, followed by a spoonful of chilled Pickled fennel.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
